text.title: Role-Specific 30-Day Plans
text.summary: Concrete 30-day plans for software engineer and sales representative roles with role-specific milestones.

example.note: Series B SaaS startup, 100 employees. Milestone: ship first PR to production.
example.code:
# Software Engineer — Days 1-30
Week 1: - [ ] Dev environment setup (laptop, Docker, local DB, SSH keys) - [ ] Codebase walkthrough with team lead (3h session, recorded) - [ ] Meet product manager: roadmap overview (30 min) - [ ] Complete architecture overview docs - [ ] Review coding standards, PR template, and CI pipeline
Week 2: - [ ] Fix first small bug (guided by team lead, tracked in Jira) - [ ] Shadow 3+ code review sessions - [ ] Understand deployment process end-to-end - [ ] Meet design partner: understand UX workflow
Weeks 3-4: - [ ] Submit first PR to production (any green-field area) - [ ] Attend all team ceremonies (standup, planning, retro) - [ ] Identify one area where docs or tooling could be improved
30-Day Milestone: Ship first PR to production with >=1 approved review and passing CI.

example.note: B2B SaaS, inbound + outbound SDR role. Milestone: pass product certification.
example.code:
# Sales Representative — Days 1-30
Week 1: - [ ] CRM setup and access (Salesforce, Outreach, LinkedIn Sales Nav) - [ ] Product deep dive training (8h course + live demo with AE) - [ ] Shadow 5+ discovery calls with senior reps
Week 2: - [ ] Learn sales methodology (MEDDIC/SPICED as applicable) - [ ] Understand ICP and buyer personas (product marketing deck) - [ ] Study top 3 competitor comparison sheets - [ ] Shadow 5+ additional calls (mix of discovery + demo)
Weeks 3-4: - [ ] Review top 10 recorded call library - [ ] Complete product certification assessment - [ ] Meet marketing, CS, and SE stakeholders (internal discovery)
30-Day Milestone: Pass product certification with score >=80%. Secondary: complete 20 shadowed calls.
